channel.title: PlexTrac, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by PlexTrac, Inc. (plextrac).

item.title: CVE-2024-12687 · 8.6 HIGH — Insecure YAML Deserialization
item.description: Deserialization of Untrusted Data vulnerability in PlexTrac (Runbooks modules) which allows Object Injection and arbitrary file writes. This issue affects PlexTrac: from 1.61.3 before 2.8.1.

item.title: CVE-2024-11839 · 8.6 HIGH — Insecure Deserialization via Runbooks Imports
item.description: Deserialization of Untrusted Data vulnerability in PlexTrac (Runbooks modules) which allows Object Injection and arbitrary file writes.This issue affects PlexTrac: from 1.61.3 before 2.8.1.

item.title: CVE-2024-11838 · 8.6 HIGH — Local File Inclusion
item.description: External Control of File Name or Path vulnerability in PlexTrac allows Local Code Inclusion through use of an undocumented API endpoint.This issue affects PlexTrac: from 1.61.3 before 2.8.1.

item.title: CVE-2024-11837 · 8.6 HIGH — N1QL Injection
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an N1QL Command ('N1QL Injection') vulnerability in PlexTrac allows N1QL Injection.This issue affects PlexTrac: from 1.61.3 before 2.8.1.

item.title: CVE-2024-11836 · 8.6 HIGH — Server-side Request Forgery
item.description: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in PlexTrac allowing requests to internal system resources.This issue affects PlexTrac: from 1.61.3 before 2.8.1.

item.title: CVE-2024-11835 · 7 HIGH — Denial of Service
item.description: Uncontrolled Resource Consumption vulnerability in PlexTrac allows WebSocket DoS.This issue affects PlexTrac: from 1.61.3 before 2.8.1.

item.title: CVE-2024-11834 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Arbitrary File Write via PTRAC Import
item.description: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') vulnerability in PlexTrac allows arbitrary file writes.This issue affects PlexTrac: from 1.61.3 before 2.8.1.

item.title: CVE-2024-11833 · 8.9 HIGH — Arbitrary Directory Write via Runbooks Artifact Upload
item.description: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') vulnerability in PlexTrac allows arbitrary file writes.This issue affects PlexTrac: from 1.61.3 before 2.8.1.
